name: 2800-202610-bby11
description: Finders Keepers is a web app for the City of Vancouver Prompt of educating people about safe food in Vancouver, and our angle is food insecurity. React based webapp, mainly in Typescript, with MongoDB backend and implementing an OCR api for some functionality.

scripts.frontend-build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run frontend-build && npm run backend-build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
